er , MoMLExportable , Moveable , Nameable Enclosing class: EmbeddedCodeActor public static class EmbeddedCodeActor.EmbeddedActor extends TypedAtomicActor An actor inside the embeddedJavaActor that is used as a dummy placeholder. The EmbeddedActor

used as a dummy placeholder. The EmbeddedActor is created in preinitialize() where ports from the outer embeddedJavaActor are connected to the EmbeddedActor. The EmbeddedActor is destroyed in wrapup(). Nested Class Summary Nested classes/inter
